last_standing.name: Conquest
last_standing.notes: Only one alliance retains any settlements or units.

endgame_project.name: Space Race
endgame_project.notes: Complete and launch all spaceship parts (Apollo Program required).

diplomatic.name: Diplomatic
diplomatic.notes: Win the World Leader election via the United Nations (secular, 60% of votes, candidate must hold Mass Media) or the Apostolic Palace (religious, 75% of votes, every living civ must hold the AP belief). Awarded directly by Assembly.apply_effect('diplomatic_victory'); the threshold is body-dependent (un_diplo_pass_share / ap_diplo_pass_share). A candidate cannot win if their own alliance contributes >= diplo_too_big_share (75%) of the total vote weight.

score.name: Score
score.notes: The reference's 7th condition: the first alliance whose summed score reaches the absolute threshold wins immediately (distinct from Time, which only tiebreaks at the turn limit). Threshold is provisional/tunable.

time.name: Time
time.notes: Highest score at the turn limit wins.
